x-enumeration-literals.name: Transaction-Based Earn
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Earned from spending or payments.

Comment:
Example: 1 point per $1 spent.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Balance-Based Earn
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Earned from maintaining account balance.

Comment:
Example: Bonus points for average balance above $10,000.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Promotional Earn
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Earned from campaigns or special offers.

Comment:
Example: Double points during promotion period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Milestone Earn
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Earned when reaching a specific target.

Comment:
Example: Bonus after spending $5,000.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Behavioral Earn
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Earned from specific actions.

Comment:
Example: Using mobile banking app.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tier-Based Earn
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Earn rate depends on customer tier.

Comment:
Example: Gold customers earn 2x points.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Event-Based Earn
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Earned from a specific event.

Comment:
Example: Account anniversary bonus.
